Tests and manages health-related data and UI interactions, with configuration and build scripts for the Health API app.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Tests and manages health-related data and UI interactions for steps, sleep, and heart rate.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Configuration file for the Health API app, specifying metadata and target platform details.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling a Pebble project with options for app and worker binaries.
